---
title: "07. 交感与关系"
subtitle: "Mutual Influence, Union, and Relationship"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 7
categories: [i-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How influence, duration, family order, opposition, decrease/increase, gathering, joy, and trust map relational structure onto ring arithmetic, spectral modes, and fold-based repair."
---

**Hexagrams:** 随(17), 蛊(18), 咸(31), 恒(32), 家人(37), 睽(38), 损(41), 益(42), 萃(45), 兑(58), 中孚(61)  
**Omega Directions:** `ring arithmetic`, `spectral theory`, `fold operator`

{{< include articles/category_07_mutual_influence_relationship.md >}}

---

[Back to I Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)


## Infographic

![category_07_mutual_influence_relationship Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_07_mutual_influence_relationship_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_07_mutual_influence_relationship_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_07_mutual_influence_relationship_infographic.png)
